title: The Name of the RosCe
author: Umberto Eco
description: A historical mystery set in an Italian monastery, blending philosophy and suspense.

title: Invisible Cities
author: Italo Calvino
description: A poetic journey through imaginary cities described by Marco Polo.

title: If This Is a Man
author: Primo Levi
description: A powerful memoir of survival in a Nazi concentration camp.

title: My Brilliant Friend
author: Elena Ferrante
description: A story of friendship and life in post-war Naples.

title: Norwegian Wood
author: Haruki Murakami
description: A nostalgic story of love and loss set in Tokyo.

title: Kafka on the Shore
author: Haruki Murakami
description: A surreal tale blending reality, dreams, and metaphysics.

title: The Sailor Who Fell from Grace with the Sea
author: Yukio Mishima
description: A dark story exploring youth, honor, and disillusionment.

title: The Devotion of Suspect X
author: Keigo Higashino
description: A brilliant crime novel involving a genius mathematician.

title: The Trial
author: Franz Kafka
description: A man is arrested and prosecuted by an unknown authority.

title: Faust
author: Johann Wolfgang von Goethe
description: A scholar makes a pact with the devil in pursuit of knowledge.

title: All Quiet on the Western Front
author: Erich Maria Remarque
description: A gripping story of soldiers during World War I.

title: The Metamorphosis
author: Franz Kafka
description: A man wakes up transformed into a giant insect.
